{{Quote|The best blades are kept in their sheaths.|Culoph|<ref name="TJP" />}}
'''Culoph''' was an individual who served as a [[Sky Judge]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tython/Legends|Tython]] before the founding of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The individual was renowned for being a legendary [[Sword/Legends|swordsman]] who had many victories during wartime.<ref name="Yoda">''[[Jedi: Yoda]]''</ref> After the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan|end]] of the [[New Sith Wars]] and the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]], Culoph was quoted by [[Battlemaster/Legends|Jedi Battlemaster]] [[Skarch Vaunk]] in a guidebook called ''[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force]]'' when Vaunk was explaining the tenets of [[Form Zero/Legends|Form "Zero"]], which emphasized a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] ability to seek non-violent methods to end a conflict.<ref name="TJP" /> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Jedi [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] quoted the Sky Judge during a conversation with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] regarding the Republic's war with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="Yoda" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Also in this section is a reference to the Tythonese Sky Judge Culoph, who is a new character created to voice an old quote. His quote, ''{{'}}''The best blades are kept in their sheaths,''{{'}}'' is from the comic ''Star Wars Jedi: Yoda''.|Daniel Wallace explains the creation of Culoph's character|<ref name="Endnotes 2">{{Blogspot|subdomain=geekosity|url=2010/12/endnotes-for-star-wars-jedi-path-part-2.html|name=Daniel Wallace's Geekosity|text=Endnotes for Star Wars: The Jedi Path (part 2 of 4)}}</ref>}}
Culoph was first mentioned as an anonymous person in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'', which was written by [[Jeremy Barlow]] and published on [[July 21]], [[2004]]. Culoph was officially created in [[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']], written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and released on [[September 28]], [[2010]]. Wallace later explained that the character was developed to give an attribution to a quote that appeared in ''Jedi: Yoda''.<ref name="Endnotes 2" />
